name: Turkey Patties in Mushroom Wine Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute half the mushrooms and chopped onion in margarine in a large frying pan.
2. Combine sauteed vegetables with turkey, egg, salt, and herbs.
3. Shape turkey mixture into 4 patties.
4. Broil 3-5 minutes on each side until cooked through.
5. While patties are cooking, add remaining mushrooms, wine, and pepper to the frying pan.
6. Simmer gently and serve sauce over patties.
Serving: 1 Serving: 1 Patty with Sauce
Nutritive values per serving: 3 gm. carbohydrates; 23 gm. protein; 13 gm. fat; 0.5 gm. fiber; 359 mg. sodium; 89 mg. cholesterol
Food Exchanges per serving: 3 1/2 Lean Meat Exchanges
Low-sodium diets: Omit salt. Use unsalted margarine.
Note: If you have a high cholesterol count, substitute EggBeaters for the egg.
